title: Bus Pirate
html:
Bus Pirate

Firmwares

  • BusPirate/Bus_Pirate

    cd Bus_Pirate/package/BPv4-firmware/pirate-loader-v4-source/pirate-loader_lnx
sudo ./pirate-loader_lnx --dev=/dev/ttyACM0 --hex=../BPv4-firmware-v6.3-r2151.hex

Examples

Dump firmware over SPI using a Bus Pirate

# Identify EEPROM chip
sudo flashrom -p <PASSFILE>

# Dump firmware using a bus pirate (SPI)
sudo flashrom -p <PASSFILE> -c (Chip name)  -r (Name.bin)

References

  • Bus Pirate Unboxing - Toolkit - Hacker Warehouse - 4 juin 2018
  • Bus Pirate 5 REV 10 Hardware
  • Ph0wn, my first IoT CTF - Part 2 - Sebastien Andrivet - 19 December 2018
  • Hardware Hacking: Plunder With a Bus Pirate - Brian Berg - February 15, 2024
